chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-42 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application (M.A 6913/2019) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on exemption application (MA 6914/2019) 4. For hearing main case. 27.08.2019 Mr. Sain Bux Nizamani advocate for applicant alongwith applicant. 1&3. Granted. 2. Overruled. 4. It is, inter alia, contended that the applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in the present case, which has been registered on behalf of the State by SIP / S.H.O P.S Khahi; that the petitioner intends to appear before the relevant court for seeking relief as contemplated u/s 498, Cr.P.C but is apprehending his arrest as the police is behind him after registration of F.I.R. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of five days from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/ and P.R Bond in the same amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of five days on 31.08.2019 or on surrender of the applicant before the relevant Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
